tools.name: contacts_search
tools.description: Search contacts by name. Returns matching names.

query.description: Part or all of the contact's name to search for

invoke.script:
tell application "Contacts"
  set matches to every person whose name contains "{{query}}"
  if matches is {} then return "No contacts found for: {{query}}"
  set resultList to {}
  repeat with p in matches
    copy name of p to end of resultList
  end repeat
  return resultList as string
end tell

tools.name: contacts_get_phone
tools.description: Get the phone number(s) for a contact by name.

name.description: Part or all of the contact's name

invoke.script:
tell application "Contacts"
  set matches to every person whose name contains "{{name}}"
  if matches is {} then return "No contact found for: {{name}}"
  set p to first item of matches
  if (count of phones of p) is 0 then return name of p & " has no phone number"
  set phoneList to {}
  repeat with ph in phones of p
    copy (label of ph & ": " & value of ph) to end of phoneList
  end repeat
  return name of p & " — " & phoneList as string
end tell

tools.name: contacts_get_email
tools.description: Get the email address(es) for a contact by name.

name.description: Part or all of the contact's name

invoke.script:
tell application "Contacts"
  set matches to every person whose name contains "{{name}}"
  if matches is {} then return "No contact found for: {{name}}"
  set p to first item of matches
  if (count of emails of p) is 0 then return name of p & " has no email address"
  set emailList to {}
  repeat with e in emails of p
    copy (label of e & ": " & value of e) to end of emailList
  end repeat
  return name of p & " — " & emailList as string
end tell

tools.name: contacts_get_birthday
tools.description: Get the birthday of a contact by name.

name.description: Part or all of the contact's name

invoke.script:
tell application "Contacts"
  set matches to every person whose name contains "{{name}}"
  if matches is {} then return "No contact found for: {{name}}"
  set p to first item of matches
  if birth date of p is missing value then return name of p & " has no birthday set"
  return name of p & " — Birthday: " & (birth date of p) as string
end tell
